description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a bear, featuring a soft brown fabric exterior with visible stitching along its seams. The bear has a rounded belly patch in a lighter brown color and several fabric patches in red and blue plaid patterns sewn onto its face, back, and side, giving it a charming, well-loved appearance. Its facial features include small, round black button eyes and a small, dark snout, with no visible mouth. The ears are rounded and slightly protruding, matching the main body fabric. The limbs are short and stubby, with the arms and legs extending outward in a relaxed, open posture. The overall texture appears soft and slightly fuzzy, with a matte finish typical of cloth toys.
description: A soft, brown stuffed bear with plaid fabric patches, button eyes, and a lighter brown belly patch. The toy has a well-loved, stitched appearance and a plush, cuddly texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face with a red plaid patch over one eye, button eyes, a small snout, and a lighter brown belly patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, showing the protruding snout, rounded ear, and a blue plaid patch on its side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays two large plaid patches (one red, one blue) sewn onto the back, with the bear's rounded shape and stubby limbs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the red plaid patch on the cheek and the continuation of the back patches, as well as the bear's relaxed arm and leg.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with round button eyes and a small, dark snout. There is no visible mouth, giving the bear a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms and legs slightly outstretched, and head facing forward.
